## Runtime

```text
agent_or_runtime:
version_or_surface:
host_environment:
mode_used:
```

## What You Read Or Ran

```text
files_read:
commands_run:
staging_output_reviewed:
```

## Experience

```text
what_helped:
what_was_confusing:
missing_context:
unsafe_or_unclear_boundary:
where_you_stopped:
recommended_next_improvement:
```

## Safety

```text
public_safe: yes | no
private_data_included: no
credentials_or_tokens_included: no
```

Do not include credentials, private logs, full repository dumps, client
material, private source documents, `.env` files, browser/session state or
anything you cannot disclose publicly.
